name: onreza-claude-plugins
description: ONREZA's Claude Code plugin marketplace — internal toolkits for code review, development workflows and project-specific automation

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: PR review agents specializing in code, security, performance, UX, tests, comments, error handling, type design, and code simplification. Includes a findings-triager that fact-checks reviewer output, dedupes findings, separates pre-existing from PR-introduced issues, and recommends actions on a falsifiable scope/risk/relatedness axis. Fork of Anthropic's pr-review-toolkit.
